name: math-deep-explain
description: Bottom-up math lesson as durable markdown (deep-explain procedure)

steps.text: Skill: math-physics-agent. Save lesson to workspace/lessons/ when done. Slash: /deep-explain

steps.prompt: Using skill math-physics-agent procedure deep-explain and knowledge/math/deep-explain-framework.md, produce a full bottom-up lesson on the user's topic (or ask for the topic). Include objective, prerequisites, intuition, formal development, mini-example, mistakes, exercises. Suggest workspace/lessons/ path. Not a substitute for course credit.
